name: Your Majesty
short_description: Enter your name and start your own dynasty. Rule your empire and choose between developing technology or culture, governing diligently or lazily. Through a series of memorials and decisions, you will determine the fate of your nation.
detailed_description:
• About Choice!

    Do you want to experience managing one dynasty after another, where every decision you make will affect the fate of your nation? Every time you review a memorial, it may affect Finance, Technology, Army, Civilization these four resources. Of course, some events are interconnected, so pay attention to their long-term impact on your country.




  • About Events!

    You will start your day’s work at 5 a.m., reviewing memorials and admiring the sky until 11 p.m. There will always be urgent events happening. Will you prioritize them or… ignore them? Of course, you can also reject everything and be an emperor who doesn’t think! Maybe laziness is your weapon.




  • About Dynasty!

    Every 20 years, your name will be inherited by the next generation. Try to pass it on!
    Your Majesty!
